summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 5 features: Settings Page with service_charge_percentage editing, Recipe mapping in Menu Item creation/editing, Timed Table Services CRUD, Auto-deduction of stock on order, and WebRTC Voice Communication between Admin and Kitchen. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Settings page with service charge input, Menu Management with recipe ingredient mapping, Active Tables with timed service UI, Admin sidebar with 'Səsli Zəng' voice call section, Kitchen Dashboard with Admin call button.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning) - minor, inherited from previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: Settings page correctly displays and updates service_charge_percentage
Recipe mapping in Menu Item dialog allows adding ingredients with quantities
Timed Services CRUD endpoints all working (POST, GET, PUT /serve, DELETE)
Auto-deduction correctly decreases ingredient stock when order placed with recipe-linked menu item
Voice WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/voice/{role} accepts connections (101 Switching Protocols)
Admin sidebar shows 'Səsli Zəng' section with 'Mətbəx' call button
Kitchen Dashboard shows 'Admin' call button with online status indicator
Service charge is correctly applied to orders (service_charge_percentage and service_charge_amount fields)
Timed service UI in session details shows 'Vaxtlı Xidmətlər' section with add/mark served/delete buttons
All UI text is in Azerbaijani language as required
seed_data_creation: Created kitchen_test user for testing Kitchen Dashboard voice call feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 5 features tested and working. Settings page at /admin/settings with service charge editing. Menu Management at /admin/menu-management with recipe ingredient mapping in item dialog. Active Tables at /admin shows timed services in session details modal. Voice call buttons present in Admin sidebar (call Kitchen) and Kitchen Dashboard (call Admin). WebSocket endpoints for voice at /api/ws/voice/{role}.

features_tested.settings_ui: PASS - Service charge input at /admin/settings with PIN protection
features_tested.recipe_mapping_api: PASS - POST /api/recipes creates recipe with ingredient quantities
features_tested.recipe_mapping_ui: PASS - Recipe section in Menu Item dialog with ingredient selection
features_tested.timed_services_get: PASS - GET /api/timed-services returns services by session
features_tested.timed_services_ui: PASS - 'Vaxtlı Xidmət' button in session details modal
features_tested.auto_deduction: PASS - Stock decreases when order placed with recipe-linked item
features_tested.admin_voice_button: PASS - 'Səsli Zəng' section with 'Mətbəx' call button in sidebar
features_tested.kitchen_voice_button: PASS - 'Admin' call button in Kitchen Dashboard header
features_tested.service_charge_in_orders: PASS - Orders include service_charge_percentage and service_charge_amount

api_endpoints_tested: PUT /api/timed-services/{id}/serve - PASS (marks as served, increments count)
POST /api/orders - PASS (creates order with service charge applied)

elements: Maliyyə Ayarları card with service charge input
Mətbəx call button with online indicator
